likely_helper_declarations.statement_shape: forall anchor first prev xs, first.prev |-> prev ** xizi_dll_rest anchor first xs |-- xizi_dll_tail first prev anchor xs

candidate_helper_declarations.statement_shape: forall anchor first prev xs, &(first # SysDoubleLinklistNode -> node_prev) # Ptr |-> prev ** xizi_dll_rest anchor first xs |-- xizi_dll_tail first prev anchor xs
premise_discharge: first.prev ownership is the VC conjunct next.prev |-> linklist_node_pre
xizi_dll_rest is directly present in the VC precondition

proof_groups.natural_language_proof_strategy: Select one identical disjunct, unfold xizi_dll, choose linklist_node_pre as the first node and next as its successor, cancel the exposed anchor/new-node cells, apply the proved rest-to-tail bridge to next.prev and xizi_dll_rest, and close the reconstructed predicate.
proof_groups.proof_strategy: Case-split the helper on l to rebuild xizi_dll_tail from the predecessor cell and xizi_dll_rest; then select a disjunct, instantiate the xizi_dll existentials, apply the suffixed helper, and finish by spatial cancellation.
proof_groups.grouping_reason: The sole witness has one self-contained spatial proof pattern and no dependency; a single group is allowed because 1 <= 12.
